author: P010_intake_form.txt
title: P010_intake_form.txt
text:
Demo only - not medical advice. Synthetic data only - no real PHI.
Patient: Rahul Sharma
MRN: MRN-2010
Date: 2023-01-15

Intake notes:
- Current smoker: about 1 pack per day for 24 years.
- Lifestyle: sedentary work; little structured exercise.
- Family history: father had myocardial infarction at age 49.
- Known diabetes since 2019; taking metformin.

Expected extraction:
Lifestyle = current smoker; sedentary.
FamilyHistory = father myocardial infarction at age 49.

asserts.subject: lifestyle
asserts.value: current smoker, 1 pack per day for 24 years
